description: I'm an Optometry student passionate about pediatric vision care, binocular vision assessment, and congenital ocular motor anomalies. I love simplifying complex academic topics through concept maps, structured notes, and visual learning aids.
bio: I'm an Optometry student passionate about pediatric vision care, binocular vision assessment, and congenital ocular motor anomalies. I love simplifying complex academic topics through concept maps, structured notes, and visual learning aids making learning accessible and engaging. Beyond academics, I create interactive quizzes and MCQs to support peer learning and foster curiosity in vision science.
